title: daphne mezereum subsp. rechingeri
intro: Daphne mezereum subsp. rechingeri is a subspecies of the mezereum daphne plant, a flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Daphne mezereum subsp. rechingeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although it's essential to exercise caution when using it due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
